subcodes.first_line: O Ghulám-Qablí-Ḥusayn! Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and from it We perceived the fragrance of thy turning and devotion unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل حسین قد حضر کتابک و وجدنا منه عرف توجهک و اقبالک الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @growth of the Cause, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
